name: GetBusNameContext
title: GetBusNameContext
syntax: dword GetBusNameContext(dword busType, dword channelNumber); // form 2
description: Returns the context of the specified bus.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The name of the bus.The bus name can be taken from the CANoeSimulation Setup: Open the System View Select a network Select the Rename... shortcut menu command Copy the name from the dialog

parameters.name: busType
parameters.description: Bus Type of the bus. The predefined enum BusType should be used for the value of this parameter.

parameters.name: channelNumer
parameters.description: Number of the channel for the specified bus. Channel numbering starts with 1.

return:
In the case of success, the context of the specified bus is returned.
If the specified bus does not exist, 0 is returned.

description: This is an example for a simulation node.Test nodes should copy the bus context to a CAPL variable in the Main() function because all global variables are cleared when a test module is started.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
